# IBANforge

> IBAN validation & BIC/SWIFT lookup API for developers and AI agents

## API Base URL
https://ibanforge-production.up.railway.app

## Endpoints

### Validate IBAN
POST /v1/iban/validate
Content-Type: application/json
Body: {"iban": "CH93 0076 2011 6238 5295 7"}
Cost: $0.005 USDC (free during launch)

### Batch Validate
POST /v1/iban/batch
Content-Type: application/json
Body: {"ibans": ["CH93...", "DE89..."]}
Cost: $0.002/IBAN (free during launch)

### Lookup BIC/SWIFT
GET /v1/bic/{code}
Example: GET /v1/bic/UBSWCHZH80A
Cost: $0.003 USDC (free during launch)

### Free Endpoints
GET /v1/demo — Example results, always free
GET /health — API health check
GET /stats — Usage statistics
GET /openapi.json — OpenAPI 3.1 specification
GET /.well-known/x402 — x402 agent discovery

## MCP Integration
Tools: validate_iban, batch_validate_iban, lookup_bic
Config: {"command": "npx", "args": ["tsx", "src/mcp/server.ts"]}

## SDKs
TypeScript: npm install ibanforge
Python: pip install ibanforge

## Links
Documentation: https://ibanforge.vercel.app/docs
Playground: https://ibanforge.vercel.app/playground
Pricing: https://ibanforge.vercel.app/pricing
GitHub: https://github.com/cammac-creator/ibanforge
